availability.preferred_schedule: flexible — can cover EU and US business hours

education.notes: Completed first year of program before relocating to Portugal.

experience.title: AI Annotation & Language QA — Independent Practice
experience.description: Completed Udemy SMM certification; building annotation and content QA portfolio across PT, UK, RU. Evaluating AI-generated text for fluency, factual accuracy, and cultural appropriateness across three native languages.

experience.title: Workforce Manager
experience.description: Owned workforce planning and scheduling across 15 international markets for the Zara Online customer-service operation. Real-time intraday monitoring, KPI/SLA reporting (AHT, occupancy, shrinkage, productivity), HR partnership on staffing and training, forecasting via advanced Excel and dedicated WFM software.

experience.title: Customer Service Representative
experience.description: Personalised customer service in Portuguese and English for a leading cosmetics retail brand. Built customer loyalty through active listening; drove revenue via cross-sell, up-sell, and merchandising.

common_application_answers.why_this_role: I'm a quadrilingual operations professional (PT / UA / RU / EN) transitioning into AI data annotation. My background managing workforce KPIs across 15 markets at Konecta-Zara taught me the precision and structured judgment that annotation pipelines depend on, and my native fluency across three under-represented training-data languages (especially European Portuguese) is a direct fit.
common_application_answers.why_this_company: PLATFORM_SPECIFIC_PLACEHOLDER — bot should swap with one sentence about the platform.
common_application_answers.biggest_strength: Detail-oriented work under quality metrics — my previous role measured me daily on SLA, shrinkage, and adherence, and I bring that same discipline to per-task evaluation.
common_application_answers.preferred_languages_to_work_on: European Portuguese (highest priority), Ukrainian, Russian, English
